headline: Essex Property Trust to Present at The 2026 Nareit REITweek Conference
summary: SAN MATEO, Calif., May 29, 2026--Essex Property Trust, Inc. (NYSE:ESS) announced today that Angela L. Kleiman, President and CEO, will be participating in a roundtable presentation at the 2026 Nareit REITweek Conference on Wednesday, June 3, 2026 at 2:00 p.m. Eastern Time.

headline: Why Is Mid-America Apartment Communities (MAA) Up 1.3% Since Last Earnings Report?
summary: Mid-America Apartment Communities (MAA) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.
